'''âb-dh-h''' ('''badhaha''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:lobotomise|lobotomise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-dh-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:lobotomise|lobotomise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âb-dh-h
|-
! Lemma
| badhaha
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:badhahithi|badhahithi]] || [[word:badhahiji|badhahiji]] || [[word:badhahishi|badhahishi]] || [[word:badhahi|badhahi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:badhahuthuth|badhahuthuth]] || [[word:badhahujuj|badhahujuj]] || [[word:badhahushush|badhahushush]] || [[word:badhah|badhah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:badhahuthu|badhahuthu]] || [[word:badhahuju|badhahuju]] || [[word:badhahushu|badhahushu]] || [[word:badhahu|badhahu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:badhahufuth|badhahufuth]] || [[word:badhahufuj|badhahufuj]] || [[word:badhahufush|badhahufush]] || [[word:badhahuf|badhahuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:badhahethe|badhahethe]] || [[word:badhaheje|badhaheje]] || [[word:badhaheshe|badhaheshe]] || [[word:badhahe|badhahe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:badhahothoth|badhahothoth]] || [[word:badhahojoj|badhahojoj]] || [[word:badhahoshosh|badhahoshosh]] || [[word:badhah|badhah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:badhahotho|badhahotho]] || [[word:badhahojo|badhahojo]] || [[word:badhahosho|badhahosho]] || [[word:badhaho|badhaho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:badhahofoth|badhahofoth]] || [[word:badhahofoj|badhahofoj]] || [[word:badhahofosh|badhahofosh]] || [[word:badhahof|badhahof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:badhahĂŻf|badhahĂŻf]] || [[word:badhahĂŻf|badhahĂŻf]] || [[word:badhahĂŻf|badhahĂŻf]] || [[word:badhahĂŻf|badhahĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:badhahĂŻfĂŻf|badhahĂŻfĂŻf]] || [[word:badhahĂŻfĂŻf|badhahĂŻfĂŻf]] || [[word:badhahĂŻfĂŻf|badhahĂŻfĂŻf]] || [[word:badhahĂŻfĂŻf|badhahĂŻfĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:badhahĂŻf|badhahĂŻf]] || [[word:badhahĂŻf|badhahĂŻf]] || [[word:badhahĂŻf|badhahĂŻf]] || [[word:badhahĂŻf|badhahĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:badhahĂŻf|badhahĂŻf]] || [[word:badhahĂŻf|badhahĂŻf]] || [[word:badhahĂŻf|badhahĂŻf]] || [[word:badhahĂŻf|badhahĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:badhahĂŠthĂŠ|badhahĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:badhahĂŠjĂŠ|badhahĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:badhahĂŠshĂŠ|badhahĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:badhahĂŠ|badhahĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:badhahathath|badhahathath]] || [[word:badhahajaj|badhahajaj]] || [[word:badhahashash|badhahashash]] || [[word:badhah|badhah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:badhahatha|badhahatha]] || [[word:badhahaja|badhahaja]] || [[word:badhahasha|badhahasha]] || [[word:badhaha|badhaha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:badhahafath|badhahafath]] || [[word:badhahafaj|badhahafaj]] || [[word:badhahafash|badhahafash]] || [[word:badhahaf|badhahaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:badhahasha|badhahasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gobadhahasha|gobadhahasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokibadhahasha|gokibadhahasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:badhahnĂŒasha|badhahnĂŒasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gobadhahnknĂŒasha|gobadhahnknĂŒasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokibadhahnĂŒasha|gokibadhahnĂŒasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:badhahshĂ«asha|badhahshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobadhahnkshĂ«asha|gobadhahnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokibadhahshĂ«asha|gokibadhahshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:badhahroasha|badhahroasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobadhahnkroasha|gobadhahnkroasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokibadhahroasha|gokibadhahroasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:badhahmuasha|badhahmuasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gobadhahnkmuasha|gobadhahnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibadhahmuasha|gokibadhahmuasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:badhahsherasha|badhahsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gobadhahnksherasha|gobadhahnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokibadhahsherasha|gokibadhahsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:badhahngasha|badhahngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gobadhahnkngasha|gobadhahnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokibadhahngasha|gokibadhahngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:badhahyaasha|badhahyaasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gobadhahnkyaasha|gobadhahnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokibadhahyaasha|gokibadhahyaasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:badhahyamasha|badhahyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gobadhahnkyamasha|gobadhahnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokibadhahyamasha|gokibadhahyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:badhahnĂŒshĂ«asha|badhahnĂŒshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gobadhahnknĂŒshĂ«asha|gobadhahnknĂŒshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokibadhahnĂŒshĂ«asha|gokibadhahnĂŒshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:badhahnĂŒroasha|badhahnĂŒroasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobadhahnknĂŒroasha|gobadhahnknĂŒroasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokibadhahnĂŒroasha|gokibadhahnĂŒroasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:badhahnĂŒmuasha|badhahnĂŒmuasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobadhahnknĂŒmuasha|gobadhahnknĂŒmuasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibadhahnĂŒmuasha|gokibadhahnĂŒmuasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:badhahshĂ«nĂŒasha|badhahshĂ«nĂŒasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gobadhahnkshĂ«nĂŒasha|gobadhahnkshĂ«nĂŒasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokibadhahshĂ«nĂŒasha|gokibadhahshĂ«nĂŒasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:badhahshĂ«roasha|badhahshĂ«roasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobadhahnkshĂ«roasha|gobadhahnkshĂ«roasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokibadhahshĂ«roasha|gokibadhahshĂ«roasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:badhahshĂ«muasha|badhahshĂ«muasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobadhahnkshĂ«muasha|gobadhahnkshĂ«muasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibadhahshĂ«muasha|gokibadhahshĂ«muasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:badhahronĂŒasha|badhahronĂŒasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gobadhahnkronĂŒasha|gobadhahnkronĂŒasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokibadhahronĂŒasha|gokibadhahronĂŒasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:badhahroshĂ«asha|badhahroshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gobadhahnkroshĂ«asha|gobadhahnkroshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokibadhahroshĂ«asha|gokibadhahroshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:badhahromuasha|badhahromuasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobadhahnkromuasha|gobadhahnkromuasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibadhahromuasha|gokibadhahromuasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:badhahmunĂŒasha|badhahmunĂŒasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gobadhahnkmunĂŒasha|gobadhahnkmunĂŒasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokibadhahmunĂŒasha|gokibadhahmunĂŒasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:badhahmushĂ«asha|badhahmushĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gobadhahnkmushĂ«asha|gobadhahnkmushĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokibadhahmushĂ«asha|gokibadhahmushĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:badhahmuroasha|badhahmuroasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobadhahnkmuroasha|gobadhahnkmuroasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokibadhahmuroasha|gokibadhahmuroasha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:badhah|badhah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:bĂŠdhĂŠh|bĂŠdhĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hobadhah|hobadhah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hobĂŠdhĂŠh|hobĂŠdhĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohobadhah|hohobadhah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohobĂŠdhĂŠh|hohobĂŠdhĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒbadhah|nĂŒbadhah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒbĂŠdhĂŠh|nĂŒbĂŠdhĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒbadhah|nĂŒnĂŒbadhah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒbĂŠdhĂŠh|nĂŒnĂŒbĂŠdhĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻbadhah|nĂŻbadhah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻbĂŠdhĂŠh|nĂŻbĂŠdhĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻbadhah|nĂŻnĂŻbadhah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻbĂŠdhĂŠh|nĂŻnĂŻbĂŠdhĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lubadhah|lubadhah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lubĂŠdhĂŠh|lubĂŠdhĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulubadhah|lulubadhah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulubĂŠdhĂŠh|lulubĂŠdhĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:libadhah|libadhah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:libĂŠdhĂŠh|libĂŠdhĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilibadhah|lilibadhah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilibĂŠdhĂŠh|lilibĂŠdhĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kobadhah|kobadhah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kobĂŠdhĂŠh|kobĂŠdhĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokobadhah|kokobadhah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokobĂŠdhĂŠh|kokobĂŠdhĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kebadhah|kebadhah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kebĂŠdhĂŠh|kebĂŠdhĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekebadhah|kekebadhah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekebĂŠdhĂŠh|kekebĂŠdhĂŠh]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|a3ddb2a}}
